classes.label: yellow-bellied sea snake
classes.field_guidance: Keep people and dogs back from the animal. Treat any suspected bite as a snake-bite emergency and call 000.

classes.label: red-bellied black snake
classes.field_guidance: Do not approach for a closer look. Give the snake space and use snake-bite first aid for any suspected bite.

classes.label: eastern brown snake
classes.field_guidance: Back away slowly, leave an escape path, and treat any suspected bite as life-threatening.

classes.label: western brown snake
classes.field_guidance: Do not handle or try to identify at close range. Use snake-bite first aid for any suspected bite.

classes.label: tiger snake
classes.field_guidance: Keep distance, especially near wetlands or damp habitat. Use snake-bite first aid for any suspected bite.

classes.label: coastal taipan
classes.field_guidance: Stay well clear and do not try to distinguish taipans from other brown-coloured elapids in the field.

classes.label: inland taipan
classes.field_guidance: Treat any suspected taipan encounter with distance-first caution and any bite as a snake-bite emergency.

classes.label: sydney funnel-web spider
classes.field_guidance: Do not handle. For suspected funnel-web or mouse spider bite, call 000 and use pressure immobilisation.

classes.label: redback spider
classes.field_guidance: Shake out gear and use gloves around stored items. For bites, use a cold pack and seek advice for severe pain.

classes.label: blue-ringed octopus
classes.field_guidance: Never handle rock-pool octopus, shells, or hidden marine animals. Call 000 for suspected bite or breathing symptoms.

classes.label: reef stonefish
classes.field_guidance: Wear protective footwear in reef or northern coastal habitat. Call 000 for severe pain or systemic symptoms.

classes.label: box jellyfish
classes.field_guidance: Follow local stinger signs and call 000 for major tropical jellyfish stings.

classes.label: saltwater crocodile
classes.field_guidance: Obey crocodile signs and keep well back from northern water edges.

classes.label: gympie stinging tree
